message:
fix(cli,core,fuse): use serde_json for JSON error escaping, add metrics on scope failure

Replace hand-rolled JSON string escaping in cmd_repair.rs and main.rs (fsck_cmd)
with serde_json::to_string(), which handles all Unicode and control characters
correctly; adjust the surrounding format string so the serialized value (already
quoted) is emitted directly rather than double-quoted.

In ffs-core, add clarifying comments on the btrfs fallocate log-contract tests
noting that Arc-backed log buffers remain valid after the subscriber guard drops.
Modernise a format-string argument to use the Rust 2021 captured-identifier form
({logs:?} instead of {:?}).

In ffs-fuse, record an error metric when begin_request_scope fails (previously
the early return bypassed record_err()), ensuring degradation counters stay
accurate for scope-init failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
